@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After correctly joining 2015 metadata (query_db:5) with the full articles set (query_db:40), the agent’s execute_python:44 used an overly broad keyword-based classifier for the "World" category (e.g., matching 'europe', 'asia', 'africa', 'america'), misclassifying many articles and yielding the wrong top region ("South America") instead of the ground truth ("Africa").
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent retrieved 2015 metadata (functions.query_db:0; functions.execute_python:8) but, after failing to fetch article contents via bulk Mongo queries ($in returned empty in functions.query_db:22 and :58 while single-ID fetch worked in :24 and :68) and only getting a 5-record sample for the collection (functions.query_db:10, :26), it stopped early and returned an inability message (functions.return_answer:74) without performing the required World-category classification and regional aggregation.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After correctly retrieving 2015 metadata (query_db:0) and all articles (query_db:24) and merging them, the agent’s execute_python:30 used a simplistic keyword-based classifier that misclassified many business/economy articles as "World," leading it to incorrectly count Europe as top instead of Africa.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent retrieved only five articles (article_ids 0–4) from the articles collection (functions.query_db:20) and, after merging with the 6,696 2015 metadata records (functions.query_db:12 via functions.execute_python:16/26) yielding zero matches, incorrectly concluded it could not answer—even though a later query (functions.query_db:28) shows many more articles were available.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent had a correct plan (merge 2015 metadata with article texts and categorize) but mis-implemented data loading—using only the 5-record sample from articles_database (query_db:24/26) and inferring ID mismatch from counts/ranges (execute_python:16, execute_python:40) rather than reading the full articles file (e.g., query_db:18), leading it to incorrectly conclude the query could not be answered.
B. Failure modes encountered:
